LanguageData.DF_DefensiveInfection_Message: {0} was infected by physical contact with contaminated blood/tissue.
LanguageData.DF_OffensiveInfection_Message: {0} was infected by an attack from {1}.
LanguageData.DF_CorpseInfection_Message: {0} has contracted {1} from exposure to an infected corpse ({2}).
LanguageData.DF_TempInfection_Message: {0} has contracted {1} due to severe exposure.
LanguageData.DF_FomiteInfection_Message: {0} has contracted {1} through contact with a contaminated object ({2}).
LanguageData.DF_SurgicalInfection_Message: {0} has been infected with {1} during surgery.
LanguageData.DF_NaturalOrganInfection_Message: {0} has been infected with {1} during organ transplantation.
LanguageData.DF_ZoonosisInfection_Message: {0} has contracted {1} from interacting with an infected animal ({2}).
